reviews.review_description: nice arcade style game shame it seems like the developer has given up on this as it was released 2023 would have been nice to have a full game as i did think this would have been longer than a demo.
Great first level. Smooth and solid. Definitely will be keeping my eye on this. Keep up the good work. Donation ? No problem... Worth every bit.....

Its an interesting game with a Universe I'm taking a keen interest in, if the full game comes out im definitely gonna buy, and I hope in the future new games in this universe could come out, one I imagine sometimes is one where you are apart of the Order, idk what it'd be like though, but back to what I was saying, this game has some great potential.
It’s simple and to the point: you shoot baddies with your machine gun from a helicopter. The visuals look wonderful, and the gun controls work flawlessly. It’s just very short.

As I was trying the game out for the first time, my problem was however when I was sitting in a chair the gun was lower than where I was at; so I had to hunch over a little to grab the gun and maneuver abit to reach the opposite sides of the firing range of the gun. So hopefully an option to adjust the gun level while sitting would be a plus.
An excellent little game. I can't wait for the additional content. The “demo mission” is a lot of fun. Looking forward to more!

I tried it and even purchased 6$ support pack as I think the idea is nice and fresh and has potential. But graphics require serious improvement like high quality textures, light and reflections for helicopter, characters, guns and all outside environment to make this game more attractive and enjoyable.

developer_response.body:
First of all, thank you for your support! It means the world to us! 
We understand your concerns about certain parts of the graphics. The trade-off was made, opting to simplify certain elements in order to create a vast open-air level you can experience from an aerial view and still meet performance guidelines. We hope Quest 3 will give us more wiggle room to increase graphics level

reviews.review_title: Much fun, better than it looks
reviews.review_description: I was recommended this on Facebook and its really fun! Much better than it seems in screenshots. It's very fun to protect your colleague using the gun, I'd include also rockets or other attacks, different environments with rain, night, etc. And different routes to choose in a stage so it's more replayable.  High potential!! Recommended

Like an old school arcade game but in VR.
Fly a chopper and use the chain link gun from the Matrix scene.
Great fun, can't wait for more levels to launch.

developer_response.body: Thank you! That's true! Nineties action movies inspired us a lot!

reviews.review_description: This is a good start, and I would like to see more levels and more difficulties. I enjoyed the few minutes it takes to run the one run it has. I even bought something to fund the development with hopes of a future for this game.

reviews.review_title: Was really into it but now
reviews.review_description:
Not understanding it's showing limited functionality now when it was running great. Infinite loading screen once you get into the game. 
Edit: The developer rocks. Thank you

Go ahead and grab it for free right now and give it a shot, because trust me, it's pretty fun! You've got one mission to play, and it'll just take you 5+ minutes. The whole experience of riding and shooting from a helicopter is simply bada$$! Personally, I hope they implement the use of a sniper rifle with a scope too.

It has great potential to be one of the best VR shooters for sure. It gives me some nostalgia for the legendary games like House of Dead and arcade shooting games. Can't say it was easy to pass the first mission and that's even better (I don't like too ez games lol) The guy with the RPG firing a rocket right to your face looks so immersive and cool. Definitely worth waiting for the whole game to be published! Can't wait!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome feedback! We're thrilled that you're enjoying the immersive experience and challenge of the game. The nostalgia factor and intense moments, like the RPG scene, are exactly what we aimed for. We can't wait to deliver the full game to you

reviews.review_description: This game pretty much kicks butt. It is fun as hell sitting in the door of the chopper and laying waste to  those who wish to do us harm. I bought the Support Pack so I got the mini-gun upgrade and that baby REALLY kicks butt. It's a ton of fun. Hopefully, we get the full game soon!

A short demo but a fun little ride.  Easy enough for me to get through but I am sure there will be difficulty level adjustments as it develops.  I think it would have nice replay ability with upgraded weapons and higher difficulty.  But leave the difficulty up to us.  Sometimes I want it too easy and sometimes I want it super challenging.  Fun casual game that I would pay to play.

P.S.  Supporting the dev for $5.99 is a good deal :) the upgraded machine gun is very satisfying!

Heliraid is an absolute adrenaline rush! VR controls are smooth, ensuring a comfortable experience. Heliraid offers visceral combat and deep immersion. It makes me feel like I'm a real helicopter gunner. Firing the minigun is pure excitement, and the weapon feedback is satisfying. A fresh start lets me know that this game has great potential. I'm looking forward to more levels!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are glad you liked it!

reviews.review_description: Downloaded to Meta Oculus 2/256. First screen appears then........ the word "LOADING". Nothing else. It just wont load. Eventually (after 15 minutes of "LOADING") the word "LOADING" just sits there and vibrates. Any idea how to re-install? I tried "uninstall" but not able to delete. I then relaod and the same results. Frustrting to say the least!

developer_response.body:
We are sorry, we see a problem from the store side, and we hope to solve it with them soon. We will let you know.

UPDATE:
We fixed the problem with the hotfix; now you can try the game. 
Thank you for noticing, and sorry for the inconvenience!
